Off Calendar Sep-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Michael J. Plocki of GORDON & REES (415-986-5900), appearing for defendant / moving party TRZ Realty, LLC
Oren P. Noah of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties William Duty, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT TRZ REALTY, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant TRZ Realty, LLC's motion for summary judgment is denied and its alternate motion for summary adjudication is denied as to issue 2 (premises owner/contractor liability) and off calendar as to issue 1 (products liability). Defendant failed to sustain its burden of demonstrating that plaintiffs do not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that Mr. Duty was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials attributable to defendant. Plaintiffs' responses to defendant's special interrogatories and Mr. Calhoun's deposition testimony preclude defendant from successfully invoking the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. Plaintiffs represent that they have dismissed their products liability cause of action. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12436 (503/TLJ)
